overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character exploring an alien landscape with red rock formations, glowing orange ground veins, and a distant industrial spire. The character walks and runs along cliff edges and through a narrow canyon passage accompanied by a small lizard-like creature companion.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien plateau with glowing ground veins and distant industrial spire

events.description: character transitions from walking to running toward the canyon entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward a narrow canyon entrance, scanning the surroundings

notable_agents.action: small lizard-like companion creature following closely behind the character
flying manta-ray-like creatures circling overhead in the sky

entered.detail: tall industrial metal spire with antenna-like structures on a distant cliff
steep reddish rock face forming the edge of the plateau
glowing orange-red patches and lines on the ground surface
large rock formations floating in the hazy sky background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open alien plateau with glowing orange veins in the reddish soil. A tall industrial spire stands visible on a distant cliff to the right while flying creatures circle overhead. The small companion creature follows behind as the character approaches a canyon entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon passage between tall stone walls

events.description: entering narrow canyon passage with rock walls rising on both sides

agents.ego_description: running then walking through the narrow canyon passage, looking around at the rock walls

notable_agents.action: companion creature running and walking alongside the character

entered.detail: tall steep rock walls forming the narrow canyon passage on both sides

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow canyon passage between steep rock walls that block the view of the sky and distant landmarks. The ground continues as a dirt trail with glowing orange patches. The companion creature stays close as they move through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlooking a deep canyon with river

events.description: exiting the narrow canyon back into open landscape with view of distant spire
canyon river becomes visible below the cliff edge to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge path, looking out over the canyon river below

notable_agents.action: companion creature walking alongside the character on the cliff path

entered.detail: wide river flowing through the deep canyon below the cliff edge
industrial spire visible again in the distance across the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character exits the canyon into an open area with expansive views of the canyon and the industrial spire visible again in the distance. As they walk along the cliff edge, a wide river becomes visible flowing through the canyon below. The path continues along the cliff with steep drops to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside path with dense bushes overlooking river canyon

agents.ego_description: walking through denser vegetation along the cliff edge, maintaining view of the river canyon

notable_agents.action: companion creature navigating through the bushes alongside the path

entered.detail: thick green bushes and shrubs lining the cliffside path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the cliffside path through denser vegetation with bushes lining the trail. The canyon river remains prominently visible below to the right, while the industrial spire grows smaller in the distance. The path winds along the cliff edge with expansive views of the hazy canyon landscape ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey across an alien plateau that narrows into a confined canyon before opening up to expansive cliffside vistas. It begins with the character and a small companion walking across reddish soil marked by glowing orange veins, with a distant industrial spire and circling creatures visible under an open sky. As the character approaches a canyon entrance, the scene shifts into a narrow passage where steep rock walls enclose the trail and block the horizon. The camera then emerges from the canyon into a wide-open area, revealing a river flowing through the depths below while the industrial spire reappears in the distance. Finally, the path winds along a high cliff edge through denser vegetation, with the spire receding as the view expands across a hazy, sprawling canyon landscape.
